CREATE TABLE values_table (x Int8, w Int8) ENGINE = Memory;
CREATE TABLE weights_table (x Int8, w Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT avgWeighted(x, w) FROM (SELECT x, w FROM values_table WHERE w > 0) AS filtered_table;
SELECT avgWeighted(x, w) FROM values_table WHERE x > 0;
SELECT avgWeighted(x, w) FROM values_table WHERE w IN (1, 2);
CREATE TABLE test_table (t UInt8) ENGINE = Memory;
CREATE TABLE complex_table (id UInt8, value Int8, weight Int8) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT AVG(avgWeighted(value, weight)) FROM complex_table GROUP BY id;
SELECT avgWeighted(x, w) FROM (SELECT x, w FROM (SELECT x, w FROM values_table UNION ALL SELECT x, w FROM weights_table) AS combined_table) AS final_table;
SELECT avgWeighted(SELECT avg(x) FROM weights_table, SELECT avg(w) FROM weights_table);
SELECT avgWeighted(x, w) OVER (PARTITION BY w) FROM complex_table;
